name: 16oz Stoneware The Very Best Grandma Mug Orange - Threshold™: Coffee Mug, Microwave & Dishwasher Safe, 16oz Capacity
description:
Surprise your grandma with her favorite beverage served in the 16-Ounce Stoneware Heart Phase/Print Mug from Threshold™. This speckled, orange mug features the message "the very best grandma" printed inside a heart decorated with greenery for an eye-catching appeal. Suitable for both hot and cold beverages, this stoneware mug allows quick reheating and cleaning with its microwave- and dishwasher-safe design.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
